text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sat May  3 08:48:46 2014
New Revision: 352893
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/352893
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r352893/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/189261
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/net/p5-Event-tcp/Makefile

Modified: head/net/p5-Event-tcp/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/p5-Event-tcp/Makefile	Sat May  3 08:48:42 2014	(r352892)
+++ head/net/p5-Event-tcp/Makefile	Sat May  3 08:48:46 2014	(r352893)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	net devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Glue code to build client-server style TCP-based services
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Event>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Event \
 		p5-Ioctl>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Ioctl
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
